text: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq sets a new intraday record, Dow and S&P 500 trade higher after Trump said he would extend cease-fire with Iran; Tesla results on tap; Brent crude oil trades around $100 a barrel - MarketWatch
fullText: Stocks trade higher on Wednesday after President Donald Trump said he would extend the cease-fire agreement with Iran, a unilateral move.

text: Family of teen girl found dead in trunk of singer D4vd's Tesla says 'all we want is justice' - NBC News
fullText: The family of a 14-year-old California girl whose remains were found in the trunk of singer D4vd's Tesla said "all we want is justice" in their first public statement.

fullText: SpaceX says it has the rights to buy artificial intelligence coding tool Cursor for $60 billion later this year as Elon Musk’s space exploration and AI company looks for ways to compete with rivals Anthropic and OpenAI ahead of a planned Wall Street debut. Sp…

text: Trump advisers privately strategize around a new midterm push: Democrats would be worse - CNN
fullText: President Donald Trump’s political team knows voters aren’t thrilled with the current state of affairs. But they’re betting they can convince them things will get markedly worse if Democrats win back power in November.

text: Neon Acquires James Gray’s ‘Paper Tiger’ - Deadline
fullText: Neon has acquired James Gray’s latest feature film Paper Tiger, starring Adam Driver, Scarlett Johansson and Miles Teller.

text: Box Office: ‘Michael’ Aims for $70 Million-Plus Debut, Record Start for Music Biopic - Variety
fullText: "Michael" will moonwalk to No. 1 at the box office. How high will it soar?

text: Trump administration in advanced talks for Spirit Airlines rescue package, source says - CNBC
fullText: The Trump administration is preparing to rescue ailing budget carrier Spirit Airlines.

text: Iran fires on 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire - Fox News
fullText: Iran attacked two vessels in the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after President Donald Trump extended a U.S. ceasefire in the region, allowing Tehran more time to present a "unified proposal."

text: RFK Jr. goes before the Senate. One lawmaker’s competing loyalties will be on display - AP News
fullText: Sen. Bill Cassidy faces a tough situation as he questions Robert F. Kennedy Jr. in two Senate hearings. Cassidy supported Kennedy's confirmation as health secretary but is a strong vaccine advocate and has clashed with him over vaccine policies. Kennedy was a…

text: Alan Osmond, oldest brother in family music group The Osmonds, dies at 76 - NBC News
fullText: Alan Osmond, oldest member of the famed family singing group The Osmonds, has died, leaving a legacy of having "quietly carried so much responsibility so the rest of us could shine," his loved ones said Tuesday

text: Two University of South Florida doctoral students are missing, police say - NBC News
fullText: Two doctoral students at the University of South Florida are missing, the school's police department said in a statement Tuesday.

text: Druzhba pipeline restarts Russian oil flows to Europe, unblocking E.U. loan for Kyiv - NBC News
fullText: Russian oil flowed through the Ukrainian section of the Druzhba pipeline on Wednesday after a halt lasting months, officials said, allowing Hungary to lift its veto on a 90 billion euro ($105.79 billion) E.U. loan urgently needed by Kyiv

text: Season From HeLLLLLLLLLLLL: Miserable Mets Can’t Stop Losing - WSJ
fullText: After 12 straight defeats, surrender flags are out for the mega-payroll New York club. Obviously, it’s the mayor’s fault.

text: Trump blasted Obama’s Iran deal. Now he faces similar tradeoffs. - The Washington Post
fullText: As U.S. envoys pursue peace talks, the president confronts persistent sticking points: sanctions relief, enrichment limits and the risk of empowering Tehran.

text: Man charged for previously having gun used to kill 8 children in Louisiana says it was stolen from his truck - CBS News
fullText: The assault-style rifle used to kill eight children in a Louisiana mass shooting was stolen from a truck, the gun's previous owner said.
